title: EAE CORE — physical identity, integrity conflict, expanded ZIP quarantine
reason: Refine CORE INGESTION after path approval: policy is evaluation metadata only; conflicting manifests must not be overwritten; expand archive security tests.
decision: Physical content identity is the complete SHA-256 of source bytes.
ingestion_policy_version does not create a second physical asset; evaluation logs are separate.
Equivalent existing manifest → ALREADY_INGESTED; different existing manifest at same identity → REGISTRY_INTEGRITY_CONFLICT.
ZIP inspection covers ../, absolute, Windows traversal, symlink, duplicate destinations, and excessive compression ratio.
Frozen kernel and component-passport rc1 remain unchanged.
